verse.name: v1
verse.lines: What gift have I, dear Lord, to give thee? What shall I set before thy throne? Thou art the giver of every treasure I can but offer thee thine own

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Take thou my song and I will praise thee Teach me to sing for thy delight Let every echo tell of thy glory Take thou my song; my song is thine

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Take thou my heart, oh how I love thee For thou art just, thou art kind Let my devotion bear witness of thee Take thou my heart; my heart is thine

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Take thou my soul, for thou hast bought me With countless tears, with love divine My debt is purchased by thy tender mercy Take thou my soul; my soul is thine

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: All that I am I freely offer Withholding nothing that is mine I place my heart, my song, my soul upon the altar Oh Savior, take my all; my all is thine
